title: DeploymentContext
description: The deployment context for an agent in an Agent Governance Evidence Pack.

deployment_name.description: A human-readable name for this deployment.

deployment_date.description: The date this agent was deployed (ISO 8601).

systems_touched.description: Systems, APIs, or data stores this agent can access.

data_domains.description: Data domains or classifications this agent operates over.

geographic_scope.description: Geographic or regulatory scope of this deployment.
